1.name: Quick wins
1.summary: Request dedupe, workspace ID, diagnostics N+1, health poll, ranking removal, React.memo.
successCriteria: Home load drops by several HTTP requests
Operational diagnostics uses batch DB fetch
All six sprint outcomes.md show verification complete

2.name: Payload slimming
2.summary: Lite graph, compression metadata, slim diagnostics API, lazy-load graph.
successCriteria: Home telemetry avoids full graph and compression packages
Typical home JSON materially smaller than Wave 1 baseline

3.name: Observability and baselines
3.summary: Production latency baselines, dashboard HAR harness, DB observability, LLM audit coverage, worker scopes.

4.name: Dashboard data layer
4.summary: Telemetry tiers, bootstrap endpoint, shared provider, React Query.
successCriteria: No duplicate telemetry polls across routes

5.name: Render and UX polish
5.summary: Framer layout, ref-based timers, single panel instance, gzip, compression trace UX.

6.name: Retrieval depth
6.summary: pgvector tuning, embedding cache, context-package race, timing completion, ingestion timing.
successCriteria: Ingestion and delivery pipelines fully timed

7.name: Long-term
7.summary: WebSocket stream, EXPLAIN automation, unified observability UI, metrics store, BM25 V2 spike.
